text:
State reported MSIS ID used for individuals who do not have a valid BENE_ID up to 20 alphanumeric characters
 STATE_CD MDCD State for used for Medicaid-only individuals who do not have a valid BENE_ID 2-letter postal abbreviation
 REFERENCE_YEAR Reference Year
 SAMPLE_IND 1% sample 1 - person is included in 1% sample
Null/missing
CCW Conditions HYPTHY_COMBINED Acquired Hypothyroidism - Combined Medicare Medicaid Claims 0 - Claims and FFS not met
1 - Claims met, not FFS
2 - Claims not met,
